items.name: Crispy Chicken Wings
items.description: Premium chicken wings fried to crispy perfection with your choice of seasoning options including garlic aioli, sweet soy, miso lime, or gochujang glaze. Each wing features the same quality brining process as all our chicken for maximum flavor and juiciness.
items.simplified_description: Crispy fried chicken wings with various seasoning options.

items.name: ZFC Feast
items.description: Our signature feast featuring four juicy chicken thighs fried to golden perfection with our 12-hour brine process. Served with house-made slaw and sweet pickles, plus your choice of sides. Generous portions perfect for sharing or satisfying a hearty appetite.
items.simplified_description: Four fried chicken thighs served with slaw, pickles, and sides.
